title: CjkDecomp
description: Structured JSON form of the cjk-decomp dataset (https://github.com/amake/cjk-decomp). Each entry maps a character to its operator + components per cjk-decomp's grammar. Atomic characters have operator: null and components: [].

schema_version.description: Schema version of THIS file (not upstream data).

entries.description: Character → decomposition entry. Keys are single Unicode CJK characters.

operator.description: cjk-decomp operator: lowercase letter(s) like 'a', 'c', 'b', 's', 'd', 'o', 't', 'ra', 'str', 'r3tr', 'd/t'. null means atomic.

components.description: Sub-character identifiers. Empty when atomic. May include numeric IDs for characters that don't have Unicode codepoints.
